slots: MORNING
Gateway of India & Colaba Heritage Walk
Iconic landmark, colonial architecture, waterfront views
Begin your Mumbai journey at the city's most recognizable monument. Stroll through the historic streets of Colaba and soak in the blend of colonial charm and modern city life.
AFTERNOON
Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Vastu Sangrahalaya & Kala Ghoda
Museum collections, art district, heritage buildings
Explore one of India's finest museums before wandering through Kala Ghoda's vibrant art precinct, known for its galleries, cafés, and cultural landmarks.
EVENING
Marine Drive & Girgaon Chowpatty
Queen's Necklace, sunset views, street food
Watch the city lights illuminate Mumbai's iconic coastline before indulging in local favourites like bhel puri and pav bhaji at Chowpatty Beach.
MORNING
Elephanta Caves
UNESCO World Heritage Site, rock-cut sculptures, ferry ride
Take a scenic ferry across Mumbai Harbour to discover ancient cave temples renowned for their magnificent sculptures dedicated to Lord Shiva.
AFTERNOON
Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj Terminus & Crawford Market
Victorian Gothic architecture, bustling markets, local culture
Admire one of India's most celebrated railway stations before immersing yourself in the sights, sounds, and flavours of Mumbai's historic marketplace.
EVENING
Bandra Fort & Bandstand Promenade
Sea views, heritage fort, city skyline
Unwind along Bandra's scenic waterfront and enjoy sweeping views of the Arabian Sea and the iconic Bandra-Worli Sea Link.
MORNING
Siddhivinayak Temple & Haji Ali Dargah
Spiritual landmarks, architecture, cultural heritage
Visit two of Mumbai's most revered places of worship, reflecting the city's rich spiritual diversity and enduring traditions.
AFTERNOON
Juhu Beach & ISKCON Temple
Beachfront atmosphere, local snacks, peaceful retreat
Experience Mumbai's laid-back coastal side with a stroll along Juhu Beach, followed by a visit to the serene ISKCON Temple.
EVENING
Worli Sea Face & City Skyline
Ocean views, promenade, urban landscape
Conclude your Mumbai adventure with a relaxing walk along the waterfront, taking in spectacular views of the city's ever-evolving skyline.
